title: Down-payment / advance invoice from a sales order
reuse_advice: Use the sale.advance.payment.inv wizard (Create invoice(s) → Down payment). Don't build account.move by hand. Override _prepare_invoice for extra header data.

title: Add custom data to the invoice created from a sales order
intents: đưa dữ liệu sang hóa đơn
ghi giá trị lên hóa đơn từ đơn hàng
reuse_advice: Override sale.order._prepare_invoice (header) / sale.order.line._prepare_invoice_line (line) and add to the returned vals dict. Don't override _create_invoices wholesale.

title: Delivery / commitment date already exists on the sales order
reuse_advice: Reuse sale.order.commitment_date (Delivery Date) instead of adding x_delivery_date. Confirm via `odoo-ai brief sale.order` before adding any date field.
when_not_enough: a second, semantically different date the standard field can't represent

title: React to / block sales-order confirmation
intents: kiểm tra trước khi xác nhận
phản ứng khi xác nhận đơn bán
reuse_advice: React: extend sale.order._action_confirm (the real worker) calling super(). Block: @api.constrains or an early raise in _action_confirm. Don't override the action_confirm button shell.
when_not_enough: a cross-document approval workflow (then a state machine / studio approval)

title: Apply a global discount to a sales order (discount wizard)
reuse_advice: Use the sale.order.discount wizard (Add Discount) for order-level discounts. Per-line discount is the line's discount field. Don't hand-insert negative lines.
when_not_enough: complex tiered/loyalty discounts (then pricelists / loyalty module)

title: Influence delivery/procurement created from a sales order
intents: tạo phiếu kho từ đơn bán
reuse_advice: Override sale.order.line._prepare_procurement_values (only exists with sale_stock — depend on it, not sale). Don't override _action_launch_stock_rule wholesale.
when_not_enough: bespoke multi-step routing better expressed as stock routes/rules config
